description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte olive-green and black color scheme, giving it a modern, military-inspired appearance. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer materials, evident from the matte and slightly textured surfaces. It has a single, elongated barrel with a vented or ribbed shroud at the muzzle, and a prominent sighting system mounted on top. The stock is angular and skeletonized, providing both structural support and weight reduction, and the grip is ergonomic with a trigger guard that is squared and reinforced. The receiver area is detailed with mechanical components, suggesting a semi-automatic action, and the overall build is compact yet sturdy, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with an olive-green and black finish, featuring a single barrel, skeletonized stock, and a robust, ergonomic design. The weapon is detailed with a vented barrel shroud and a prominent sighting system.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle and vented barrel shroud, with the sighting system visible on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the skeletonized stock, ergonomic grip, and detailed receiver area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's angular design and the alignment of the barrel and sighting system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the receiver and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented or ribbed shroud at the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated trigger guard with reinforced edges
